title: How "My Work" Board View Works on monday.com
excerpt: I have 5 board, right now I am seeing Board 5 at the bottom, I want to see that on Top. How can I acheive that?

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: I have 5 board, right now I am seeing Board 5 at the bottom, I want to see that on Top. How can I acheive that?

posts.author: jhammond (Jackie Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m not sure which view you are referring to, but in most cases, you can just click on the board title and drag it to the position you would like. Hope that helps.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know of a way to do that.
